entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region in Africa undergoing rapid agricultural intensification and land cover changes.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the intensity of agricultural production.

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the number of people residing in a particular area.

entities.name: LAND USE AND LAND COVER CHANGE
entities.description: Anthropogenic changes in the physical environment, including deforestation and afforestation.

entities.name: DEFORESTATION
entities.description: The removal of forest or stand of trees from land that was previously forested.

entities.name: AFFORESTATION
entities.description: The establishment of a forest or stand of trees in an area where there was no previous tree cover.

entities.name: REGIONAL CLIMATE SYSTEM
entities.description: The complex of atmospheric and surface interactions that determine the climate of a specific region.

entities.name: SURFACE ENERGY BALANCE
entities.description: The balance between incoming and outgoing energy at the Earth's surface.

entities.name: MOISTURE FLUXES
entities.description: The movement of water vapor between the surface and the atmosphere.

entities.name: ATMOSPHERIC CIRCULATION
entities.description: The large-scale movement of air by which heat is distributed on the surface of the Earth.

entities.name: CLIMATE MODELS
entities.description: Computational tools used to simulate and predict climate responses to various drivers.

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: Any form of water, liquid or solid, that falls from the atmosphere and reaches the ground.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The measure of heat or coldness of the atmosphere.

entities.name: REGIONAL WARMING
entities.description: An increase in the average temperature of a specific region.

entities.name: CARBON SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of capturing and storing atmospheric carbon dioxide.

entities.name: DROUGHTS
entities.description: Prolonged periods of abnormally low rainfall, leading to a water shortage.

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A multidisciplinary review synthesizing data from multiple publications to analyze a specific topic.

entities.name: LAND-BASED MITIGATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies aimed at reducing greenhouse gas emissions or enhancing carbon sinks through land management.

entities.name: CLIMATE POLICY
entities.description: Governmental or organizational guidelines and laws aimed at addressing climate change.

entities.name: ASSESSMENT FRAMEWORKS
entities.description: Structured approaches used to evaluate the impacts and risks of climate change.
